game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Idle Acorns**: The core loop involves players tapping or shaking the screen to generate "acorns," the primary soft currency, with an initial rate of 1 acorn per tap. Acorns are spent in the shop to purchase upgrades like "scavengers" that passively generate acorns at increasing rates (e.g., +5 acorns per second offline), and to unlock new gameplay areas such as a fishing pond, a garden, or a campfire. Unlocking the fishing pond allows players to tap a "cast line" button to initiate a simple timing-based mini-game for catching fish, which can then be cooked or traded at the campfire with newly invited characters. Progression is driven by accumulating enough acorns and other resources to unlock all 4 mini-games, over 24 craftable items, and fully upgrade all passive income sources, with no explicit win or loss condition beyond continuous growth.
game_info.description: Idle Acorns is a progressive resource management game where you build a thriving woodland economy. Start by collecting acorns manually, then purchase upgrades to automate your production. Unlock four distinct areas: the Shop for upgrades, the Fishing Pond for catching fish, the Garden for growing crops, and the Campfire for cooking and trading. Craft 24 unique items, upgrade passive income sources, and watch your acorn empire grow. There's no game over—just continuous expansion and achievement!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between different areas (Shop, Pond, Garden, Campfire)
Space: Collect acorns manually / Cast fishing line / Plant seeds / Cook items
Z: Purchase upgrades / Catch fish / Harvest crops / Trade items
Shift: Toggle automation on/off for purchased upgrades
Enter: Start game from menu
Escape: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic acorn collection and navigation between areas. Validates that manual acorn collection works and players can navigate to all four game areas.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Repeatedly press SPACE to collect acorns manually. Use arrow keys to cycle through all areas (Shop, Pond, Garden, Campfire) to verify they are accessible and render correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Acorn count should increase with each SPACE press. All four areas should be visitable without errors. The game should remain in PLAYING state throughout.

TEST_1.expected: Acorn count should increase with each SPACE press. All four areas should be visitable without errors. The game should remain in PLAYING state throughout.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete progression path to winning the game. Validates purchasing upgrades, unlocking all areas, crafting items, and achieving win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Collect acorns rapidly by holding SPACE. Purchase scavengers and upgrades systematically in the Shop. Unlock Pond, Garden, and Campfire areas in order. Craft items in each area until reaching 24 total crafted items and maxing out all upgrades.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Should achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state after crafting 24 items and fully upgrading all passive sources. Score should reflect total acorns collected and items crafted. Game should display victory message.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests fishing mini-game mechanics and fish collection. Validates timing-based gameplay in the Pond area.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Navigate to the Pond area. Repeatedly use SPACE to cast fishing line and Z at optimal timing to catch fish. Accumulate multiple fish to test resource tracking.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully caught fish should be added to inventory. Failed attempts should not reward fish. Fish count should display correctly in the UI.
TEST_3.description: Tests fishing mini-game mechanics and fish collection. Validates timing-based gameplay in the Pond area.
TEST_3.strategy: Navigate to the Pond area. Repeatedly use SPACE to cast fishing line and Z at optimal timing to catch fish. Accumulate multiple fish to test resource tracking.
TEST_3.expected: Successfully caught fish should be added to inventory. Failed attempts should not reward fish. Fish count should display correctly in the UI.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests garden planting and harvesting mechanics. Validates crop growth timing and harvest interactions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate to Garden after unlocking. Use SPACE to plant seeds (costs acorns). Wait for crops to grow over time. Use Z to harvest when ready.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Seeds should be planted successfully. Crops should grow visually over time. Harvesting should yield crops that can be used for crafting.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests campfire cooking and trading system. Validates recipe crafting using collected resources.
TEST_5.strategy_description: After collecting fish and crops, navigate to Campfire. Use Z to craft items that require multiple resources. Trade with visiting characters when available.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Items should be crafted successfully when sufficient resources are available. Crafted item count should increase. Trading should provide acorn bonuses.
